title: A reproducibility-aware decision-support evaluation framework for multimodal ECG risk stratification

creators.name: Zha, Yi
creators.affiliation: The Second Affiliated Hospital of Wenzhou Medical University

creators.name: Lin, Da
creators.affiliation: The Second Affiliated Hospital of Wenzhou Medical University

creators.name: Zhang, Yu
creators.affiliation: The Second Affiliated Hospital of Wenzhou Medical University

description: Manuscript-ready code and artifacts for a public-data ECG study evaluating a reproducibility-aware multimodal decision-support framework. Internal experiments use PTB-XL waveforms and released PTB-XL+ structured features. External validation is restricted to signal-only evaluation on CPSC2018 and Chapman-Shaoxing. The Stage 14L structured-feature audit is a reproducibility and feasibility finding, not external multimodal validation.
notes: Raw PTB-XL, PTB-XL+, CPSC2018, and Chapman-Shaoxing data are not redistributed. Users should obtain raw datasets from their original repositories.
